TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Lin Zirou Siwsi == Lin Zirou Siwsi (Br. Fritz Weber, SMB; 1932-), masofoc i Switzerland, i 1957 miheca mikapot to Paylenkay itiya, i 1964 miheca 3 folad tayni i Taywan, sa'ayaw itira i pisacakcakan to kakaenen a kofaw no Paylenkay ko tayal, miparomi'ad minanam to no Payrang a sowal itiya. I 1973 mihecaan i, tayra ci Lin Zirou Siwsi i Maryknollkay minanam to no Kowaping a sowal. I 1974 miheca, patiko haca ci Lin Zirou Siwsi toya kadademakan ningra i pisacakcakan to kakaenen. I 1993 miheca 12 foladan, itira cingra i Guiyuan no Taypisi ci Pan Erwin Simpu (Rev. Win Bollen, CICM) padamso patado to mirarakatay tamdaw kamaro'an patireng to "Pinan loma'" mipatado ko tayal. Kaitiraan ningra i "Pinan loma'" ko tayal i, hanatayra ci Lin Zirou Siwsi i kaitiraan no mirarakatay tamdaw a masasowal to no Payrang a macaca'of, saka tahidangen cangra tayra i "Pinan loma'" mingingoy a kamaen, mapadamso a mitomadaw to sakacitayal ato sadipot no isian. Kaitira ho i Posong ko tayal ni Lin Zirou Siwsi o citodongay no Paylenkay to sakidafong, ira aca ko cecay lipay papisadak to kakaenen ato fadisoso a epah, misilsil to kamaro'an, saka manga'ay ko nano demak ni Lin Zirou Siwsi i kasakapot a Simpu ato Siwsi, todong sapipalasawad to kasomadan katoolan to niyaro'. I 1978 mihecaan itiya, ci Lin Zirou Siwsi misatapang minanam to pisyasin, to lipalipay coroken ningra ko kasaciwkay no Paylenkay to tayal ato 'orip no malaSimpuay, saka manengneng ko nisyasingan ningra i Kalinta/ koyomi. Roma i, ci Lin Zirou Siwsi to mihecahecaan to tosa lipay pakatofay mirakat miliyok to Taywan misyasin, mitilid to ni'oripan no finawlan i Taywan. Malecad ci Akli Simpu ko kaolah misyasyasin, saka adihay ko nisidayan no Paylenkay pipatenak to Ratoh masidayaty a likisi, o nianan ko manengnengay i naikoran a faco no Taywan.
S.PHON: == ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi == ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi (b~b~vr. frit* wəb~b~vər, smb~b~v; ****-), maso~ufo~uʦ i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, i **** miħəʦa mikapo~ut to~u pajɾənkaj itija, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ tajni i tajwan, saʡajaw itira i pisaʦakʦakan to~u kakaənən a ko~ufaw no~u pajɾənkaj ko~u tajaɾ, miparo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ minanam to~u no~u pajraŋ a so~uwaɾ itija. i **** miħəʦaan i, tajra ʦi ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi i marjkno~uɾɾkaj minanam to~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ a so~uwaɾ. i **** miħəʦa, patiko~u ħaʦa ʦi ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi to~uja kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan niŋra i pisaʦakʦakan to~u kakaənən. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan, itira ʦiŋra i *o~u~uijo~u~uan no~u tajpisi ʦi pan ərwin simpo~u~u (rəb~v. win b~b~vo~uɾɾən, ʦiʦm) paɬ~ɮamso~u pataɬ~ɮo~u to~u mirarakataj tamɬ~ɮaw kamaro~uʡan patirəŋ to~u "pinan ɾo~umaʡ" mipataɬ~ɮo~u ko~u tajaɾ. kaitiraan niŋra i "pinan ɾo~umaʡ" ko~u tajaɾ i, ħanatajra ʦi ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi i kaitiraan no~u mirarakataj tamɬ~ɮaw a masaso~uwaɾ to~u no~u pajraŋ a maʦaʦaʡo~uf, saka taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ʦaŋra tajra i "pinan ɾo~umaʡ" miŋiŋo~uj a kamaən, mapaɬ~ɮamso~u a mito~umaɬ~ɮaw to~u sakaʦitajaɾ ato~u saɬ~ɮipo~ut no~u isian. kaitira ħo~u i po~uso~uŋ ko~u tajaɾ ni ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u pajɾənkaj to~u sakiɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, ira aʦa ko~u ʦəʦaj ɾipaj papisaɬ~ɮak to~u kakaənən ato~u faɬ~ɮiso~uso~u a əpaħ, misiɾsiɾ to~u kamaro~uʡan, saka maŋaʡaj ko~u nano~u ɬ~ɮəmak ni ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi i kasakapo~ut a simpo~u~u ato~u siwsi, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u kaso~umaɬ~ɮan kato~uo~uɾan to~u nijaro~uʡ. i **** miħəʦaan itija, ʦi ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi misatapaŋ minanam to~u pisjasin, to~u ɾipaɾipaj ʦo~uro~ukən niŋra ko~u kasaʦiwkaj no~u pajɾənkaj to~u tajaɾ ato~u ʡo~urip no~u maɾasimpo~u~uaj, saka manəŋnəŋ ko~u nisjasiŋan niŋra i kaɾinta/ ko~ujo~umi. ro~uma i, ʦi ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan to~u to~usa ɾipaj pakato~ufaj mirakat miɾijo~uk to~u tajwan misjasin, mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u niʡo~uripan no~u finawɾan i tajwan. maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ʦi akɾi simpo~u~u ko~u kao~uɾaħ misjasjasin, saka aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u nisiɬ~ɮajan no~u pajɾənkaj pipatənak to~u rato~uħ masiɬ~ɮajatj a ɾikisi, o~u nianan ko~u manəŋnəŋaj i naiko~uran a faʦo~u no~u tajwan.
S.FORM: == Lin Zirou Siwsi == Lin Zirou Siwsi (Br. Fritz Weber, SMB; 1932-), masofoc i Switzerland, i 1957 miheca mikapot to Paylenkay itiya, i 1964 miheca 3 folad tayni i Taywan, sa'ayaw itira i pisacakcakan to kakaenen a kofaw no Paylenkay ko tayal, miparomi'ad minanam to no Payrang a sowal itiya. I 1973 mihecaan i, tayra ci Lin Zirou Siwsi i Maryknollkay minanam to no Kowaping a sowal. I 1974 miheca, patiko haca ci Lin Zirou Siwsi toya kadademakan ningra i pisacakcakan to kakaenen. I 1993 miheca 12 foladan, itira cingra i Guiyuan no Taypisi ci Pan Erwin Simpu (Rev. Win Bollen, CICM) padamso patado to mirarakatay tamdaw kamaro'an patireng to "Pinan loma'" mipatado ko tayal. Kaitiraan ningra i "Pinan loma'" ko tayal i, hanatayra ci Lin Zirou Siwsi i kaitiraan no mirarakatay tamdaw a masasowal to no Payrang a macaca'of, saka tahidangen cangra tayra i "Pinan loma'" mingingoy a kamaen, mapadamso a mitomadaw to sakacitayal ato sadipot no isian. Kaitira ho i Posong ko tayal ni Lin Zirou Siwsi o citodongay no Paylenkay to sakidafong, ira aca ko cecay lipay papisadak to kakaenen ato fadisoso a epah, misilsil to kamaro'an, saka manga'ay ko nano demak ni Lin Zirou Siwsi i kasakapot a Simpu ato Siwsi, todong sapipalasawad to kasomadan katoolan to niyaro'. I 1978 mihecaan itiya, ci Lin Zirou Siwsi misatapang minanam to pisyasin, to lipalipay coroken ningra ko kasaciwkay no Paylenkay to tayal ato 'orip no malaSimpuay, saka manengneng ko nisyasingan ningra i Kalinta/ koyomi. Roma i, ci Lin Zirou Siwsi to mihecahecaan to tosa lipay pakatofay mirakat miliyok to Taywan misyasin, mitilid to ni'oripan no finawlan i Taywan. Malecad ci Akli Simpu ko kaolah misyasyasin, saka adihay ko nisidayan no Paylenkay pipatenak to Ratoh masidayaty a likisi, o nianan ko manengnengay i naikoran a faco no Taywan.
S.PHON: == ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi == ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi (b~b~vr. frit* wəb~b~vər, smb~b~v; ****-), maso~ufo~uʦ i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, i **** miħəʦa mikapo~ut to~u pajɾənkaj itija, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ tajni i tajwan, saʡajaw itira i pisaʦakʦakan to~u kakaənən a ko~ufaw no~u pajɾənkaj ko~u tajaɾ, miparo~umiʡaɬ~ɮ minanam to~u no~u pajraŋ a so~uwaɾ itija. i **** miħəʦaan i, tajra ʦi ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi i marjkno~uɾɾkaj minanam to~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ a so~uwaɾ. i **** miħəʦa, patiko~u ħaʦa ʦi ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi to~uja kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan niŋra i pisaʦakʦakan to~u kakaənən. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan, itira ʦiŋra i *o~u~uijo~u~uan no~u tajpisi ʦi pan ərwin simpo~u~u (rəb~v. win b~b~vo~uɾɾən, ʦiʦm) paɬ~ɮamso~u pataɬ~ɮo~u to~u mirarakataj tamɬ~ɮaw kamaro~uʡan patirəŋ to~u "pinan ɾo~umaʡ" mipataɬ~ɮo~u ko~u tajaɾ. kaitiraan niŋra i "pinan ɾo~umaʡ" ko~u tajaɾ i, ħanatajra ʦi ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi i kaitiraan no~u mirarakataj tamɬ~ɮaw a masaso~uwaɾ to~u no~u pajraŋ a maʦaʦaʡo~uf, saka taħiɬ~ɮaŋən ʦaŋra tajra i "pinan ɾo~umaʡ" miŋiŋo~uj a kamaən, mapaɬ~ɮamso~u a mito~umaɬ~ɮaw to~u sakaʦitajaɾ ato~u saɬ~ɮipo~ut no~u isian. kaitira ħo~u i po~uso~uŋ ko~u tajaɾ ni ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u pajɾənkaj to~u sakiɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, ira aʦa ko~u ʦəʦaj ɾipaj papisaɬ~ɮak to~u kakaənən ato~u faɬ~ɮiso~uso~u a əpaħ, misiɾsiɾ to~u kamaro~uʡan, saka maŋaʡaj ko~u nano~u ɬ~ɮəmak ni ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi i kasakapo~ut a simpo~u~u ato~u siwsi, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u kaso~umaɬ~ɮan kato~uo~uɾan to~u nijaro~uʡ. i **** miħəʦaan itija, ʦi ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi misatapaŋ minanam to~u pisjasin, to~u ɾipaɾipaj ʦo~uro~ukən niŋra ko~u kasaʦiwkaj no~u pajɾənkaj to~u tajaɾ ato~u ʡo~urip no~u maɾasimpo~u~uaj, saka manəŋnəŋ ko~u nisjasiŋan niŋra i kaɾinta/ ko~ujo~umi. ro~uma i, ʦi ɾin *iro~uo~u~u siwsi to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan to~u to~usa ɾipaj pakato~ufaj mirakat miɾijo~uk to~u tajwan misjasin, mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u niʡo~uripan no~u finawɾan i tajwan. maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ʦi akɾi simpo~u~u ko~u kao~uɾaħ misjasjasin, saka aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u nisiɬ~ɮajan no~u pajɾənkaj pipatənak to~u rato~uħ masiɬ~ɮajatj a ɾikisi, o~u nianan ko~u manəŋnəŋaj i naiko~uran a faʦo~u no~u tajwan.
